chatter: The fire in my heart will never burn out.
Even if there's someone better, shoot to be the best.
I'd better not catch any of you skipping your stretches...
I'll get up no matter how many times they knock me down.
Oh, shoot. I forgot to tape my Achilles again...
They say work smarter, not harder, but... why not do both?
I'm ready to dance. (with Symmetra and Widowmaker on the team)
I won't go easy on them.
I'm ready to prove my worth.
One win to go! Don't treat this as a cool down.
We're doing well. Just don't celebrate yet.
Giving up isn't on the table. Let's make a comeback!
We're not going down without a fight.
Last chance? *scoffs* I work best under pressure, anyway.
Time for us to see this through.
I can take more than that.
I haven't hit my limit yet.
I still have a ways to go.
*sigh* I... think I singed my eyebrows...
Now, they've lit a fire under me.
Setbacks are just part of the process.
Time to step up my training regimen.
He sure got me that time... (eliminated by Wuyang )
I know better than to go in alone.
Enemy didn't stay down. Let's fix that.
I promise, I won't let this get to my head.
That's what I bring to the table!
call-outs: Let's show them what we've got.
It's almost over, just hang in there!
Stand your ground, we can do this!
Tough this out, and we win!
If we don't pick up the pace, we lose!
We're running out of time. Move it!
We're about to lose. We have to get moving!
eliminations: Not what I'd call top talent. (eliminating Domina )
Just put some ice on it. (eliminating Mei )
Wuyang, don't let your guard down! (eliminating Wuyang )
Like a moth to a flame. (eliminating an airborne enemy)
Up in smoke! (eliminating Cassidy during Deadeye)
*laughs* It's a "diedrate", for me! (eliminating Wuyang using Tidal Blast during April Fools)
Think I'm in the anaerobic zone...
Ha! How's that for a warm-up?
I think we aced this trial.
Elimination with Ally on Low HP
Shouldn't get that close to me.
Not everyone's ready to spread their wings.
Nice to see a fellow perfectionist. (to Symmetra )
interactions: Brigitte : Lúcio and I have been thinking of throwing a little welcome party for you new recruits. You in? Anran : Do we really have time to be relaxing with everything going on? Brigitte : Sure we do. If we don't keep morale up, we won't be in any shape to fight.

Anran : I feel like I'm too hard on Wuyang sometimes. Genji : Have you spoken with him about it? Anran : No, I'm little scared to find about what he thinks. Genji : Then you know the first step you must take.
Anran : *aggressive sneeze* Whew, I think my allergies are acting up. Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows* Anran : Ugh, no wonder.

Juno : I have decided to accept your offer to train up my confidence. When will we start? Anran : Right now! Repeat after me. "I am capable. I am confident. I've got this!" Juno : On second thought, I require more time to deliberate.

Kiriko : I only ever hear horror stories about siblings. Ever wish you were an only child? Anran : Honestly? I wouldn't give up my brother for the world. (variant if Wuyang is present, replaces response above) Anran : Literally every day of my life. Wuyang : Wha-- hey!
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: what is your favorite animal? Anran : Oh, the orchid mantis! Especially the pink ones! Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!

Lúcio : Hey. Uh... did I do something to upset you? I feel like you've been avoiding me. Anran : Oh, no, no! I'm so sorry. I just really wanted an autograph, and I didn't want to be weird. Lúcio : You should have just said so! What am I signing? Anran : Everything.
Mercy : I'm quite surprised that you can get back up without my help. Anran : Hey, one less person for you to keep an eye on, right? Mercy : I wouldn't go that far.

Sojourn : You're keeping up with the team better than I expected. Maybe I should push you harder. Anran : Sure. Whatever bar you set for me, I'll hit it. Sojourn : Careful, now. Is that overconfidence I hear? Anran : Nope. Just determination.

Sojourn : You know, my twin was always sticking her neck out for me. Anran : I get that. Nothing beats helping your loved ones. Sojourn : If she hadn't let me return the favor, I'd miss out on knowing that feeling. Just some food for thought. Anran : Huh... I'd never thought of it that way.

Symmetra : I recognize a dancer's posture when I see it. Anran : Same! What style did you study? Symmetra : Kathak. As a child, performing such movements calmed me. Anran : Oh. I think training in classical Chinese dance gave me anxiety.
Wuyang : Hey, sis. Don't get in my way out there. Anran : Are you ever gonna let that go? Wuyang : Maybe... if you do my laundry for the rest of the year? Anran : Not happening.
Wuyang : Even after everything, I still made it to the front lines. Think I made mom and dad happy? Anran : Are they ever happy? Wuyang : Ah... good point.

Anran : I wasn't expecting to be thrown into the thick of it so soon after joining Overwatch . Wuyang : Yeah... I was hoping we'd have a... little more down-time. Anran : Well, we'll get through it. Taking breaks is overrated, anyway. Wuyang : *sigh* To you , maybe...

Wuyang : You gotta be more careful out there. Anran : What, and make your job easier? Hah, never. Wuyang : Ugh, for real? You've sprained your knee, like, a thousand times! Shifu would say to cherish your body. Anran : You're such a worrywart. I can handle it.

Wuyang : Thanks for convincing mom and dad to let me take a break from school . It probably wasn't easy. Anran : Eh, wasn't that bad. I told them you'd do a Masters when you got back. Wuyang : Grea-- oh, what?
map-specific: Anyone cold? I have just the thing!
Huh. Thought I'd have to train more to pull that off.
I know it's hot out, but... don't ask me to fan you. You'll regret it.
Being here reminds me... I should start looking into certificate programs.
I won't let this happen again. Next time, I'll be ready.
